---
title: "Agentic AI for Scientific Discovery"
subtitle: "Reasoning, tool-using, and autonomous AI for scientific workflows"
description: "BioMIND research on agentic AI systems for biological discovery, automated hypothesis generation, scientific reasoning, and human-AI collaboration."
---

## Overview

This area focuses on **AI systems that can reason, use tools, coordinate workflows, and support scientific discovery**. BioMIND is interested in agentic AI for biological discovery, automated hypothesis generation, scientific reasoning, model-based discovery, information gathering, and human-AI collaboration.

## Key themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Agentic AI systems
LLM-driven agents that plan, reason, and act on structured scientific workflows.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI-assisted scientific workflows
End-to-end pipelines combining reasoning, retrieval, and computation.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Tool-using AI
Tool-augmented agents that call predictors, generators, and external knowledge.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Multi-agent systems
Coordination, role specialization, debate, and self-improvement among interacting agents.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Human-AI collaboration
Mixed-initiative interfaces and shared authority for scientific reasoning.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI for research translation
Bridging from method to application via agentic discovery loops.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Scientific decision support
Calibrated, explainable AI for hypothesis generation and prioritization.
:::

:::

## Current student projects

Current BioMIND student projects in this area include **agentic AI**, **uncertainty-aware reasoning**, **RAG systems**, **preference optimization**, **multi-agent verification**, and **AI-assisted scientific discovery**. See the [Students](../people/students.qmd) and [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) pages.

## Related faculty

- [Ivan I. Garibay](../people/faculty.qmd#ivan-i-garibay) — CASL (foundation models, LLMs, agentic systems)
- [Ozlem Ozmen Garibay](../people/faculty.qmd#ozlem-ozmen-garibay) — Human-CAIR / MoML (trustworthy, human-aligned agents)
- [Niloofar Yousefi](../people/faculty.qmd#niloofar-yousefi) — AI-AIR (applied agentic AI for science and biomedicine)

## Representative publications

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) page. Agentic AI is a rapidly developing thrust — selected outputs will be added as preprints and papers appear.
